column2: 1. Make a copy of this ENTIRE excel file (Click on File ➡️ "Make a Copy" ➡️ Save to your own Google Drive)
3. Populate Column C from your chart (use the "Personality" gates, on the right. NOT "Design.")
4. Ignore the decimals. Ex) If your mars gate is 11.6, just put "11". DO NOT ROUND.
5. Read through it, take a look at the big picture - how does it resonate with you?
**Also make sure to checkout the Human Design Office Hour led by HeyJune
